# PlayTogether Hub — 10-Day Project Plan

## Day 1 — Project Idea and Research
- Defined the website purpose.
- Identified target users: schools, parents, caregivers and professionals.
- Reviewed the need for inclusive play and safeguarding-focused activities.

## Day 2 — User Stories and Requirements
- Created user stories for navigation, services, activities, contact and safeguarding.
- Defined must-have, should-have and could-have features.
- Confirmed the website should have 3 pages.

## Day 3 — Wireframe Planning
- Planned page structure for Home, Activities and About.
- Designed the user journey from homepage to activity cards and contact.
- Created wireframe layout for all pages.

## Day 4 — HTML Structure
- Built the main HTML pages.
- Added navbar, hero sections, content sections and footer.
- Linked all pages together.

## Day 5 — Bootstrap Layout
- Added Bootstrap 5.3 grid system.
- Created responsive cards, buttons, navbar and page sections.
- Tested desktop, tablet and mobile layout.

## Day 6 — CSS Styling
- Created child-friendly colour palette.
- Added typography, spacing, shadows and rounded cards.
- Improved readability and accessibility.

## Day 7 — Activities and JavaScript
- Added activity card data.
- Created JavaScript-generated activity cards.
- Added popup modal logic for activity details.

## Day 8 — Safeguarding and Training Content
- Added safeguarding notes.
- Added training material sections.
- Included sensory, anxiety and communication support guidance.

## Day 9 — Testing and Improvements
- Fixed page names and links.
- Improved hero sections using background images.
- Checked responsive layout and broken links.

## Day 10 — GitHub and Documentation
- Added README.md.
- Added wireframe image.
- Committed project changes.
- Pushed final version to GitHub.
